mapper.select:
SELECT movie.* ,lowest_price_plan.lowest_price AS lowestPrice ,current_collect.id AS movieCollectId ,movie_region.name AS movieRegionName ,movie_type.name AS movieTypeName ,movie_years.name AS movieYearsName FROM movie LEFT JOIN ( SELECT movie_id, MIN(price) AS lowest_price FROM screening_plan WHERE start_time >= NOW() AND price IS NOT NULL AND price > 0 GROUP BY movie_id ) lowest_price_plan ON movie.id = lowest_price_plan.movie_id LEFT JOIN movie_collect current_collect ON movie.id = current_collect.movie_id AND current_collect.user_id = #{query.currentUserId} LEFT JOIN movie_region ON movie.movie_region_id=movie_region.id LEFT JOIN movie_type ON movie.movie_type_id=movie_type.id LEFT JOIN movie_years ON movie.movie_years_id=movie_years.id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN lowest_price_plan.lowest_price IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, movie.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT count(movie.id) FROM movie LEFT JOIN movie_region ON movie.movie_region_id=movie_region.id LEFT JOIN movie_type ON movie.movie_type_id=movie_type.id LEFT JOIN movie_years ON movie.movie_years_id=movie_years.id

if.test: query.movieTypeId != null and query.movieTypeId != '' and query.movieTypeId != 0
query.movieYearsId != null and query.movieYearsId != '' and query.movieYearsId != 0
query.movieRegionId != null and query.movieRegionId != '' and query.movieRegionId != 0

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO movie
name, main_img, movie_type_id, movie_years_id, movie_region_id, release_date, duration, director, protagonist, intro, imgs, create_time,
VALUES
#{name}, #{mainImg}, #{movieTypeId}, #{movieYearsId}, #{movieRegionId}, #{releaseDate}, #{duration}, #{director}, #{protagonist}, #{intro}, #{imgs}, #{createTime},
mapper.update:
UPDATE movie
name = #{name},
main_img = #{mainImg},
movie_type_id = #{movieTypeId},
movie_years_id = #{movieYearsId},
movie_region_id = #{movieRegionId},
release_date = #{releaseDate},
duration = #{duration},
director = #{director},
protagonist = #{protagonist},
intro = #{intro},
imgs = #{imgs},
box_office = #{boxOffice},
score = #{score},
create_time = #{createTime},
WHERE id = #{id}
